description: Written FIRST (inside LockService lock) before any processing begins. Prevents duplicate email handling on concurrent or retry runs. Key = Gmail message ID. Idempotency check: if key exists with status COMPLETED, skip entirely. If PROCESSING, check age — if > 10 min, treat as abandoned and reprocess.
locking_requirement: All reads and writes to this tab MUST be inside LockService.getScriptLock(). Never read-then-write outside a lock.

columns.name: idempotency_key
columns.description: Gmail message ID or other unique event identifier. Primary key.

columns.name: started_at
columns.description: When PROCESSING status was written (used for abandoned lock detection)

columns.name: completed_at
columns.description: When COMPLETED, FAILED, or SKIPPED status was written

columns.name: booking_id
columns.description: Booking ID if one was created or matched during processing

columns.name: draft_id
columns.description: Gmail draft ID if a draft was created

columns.name: trace_id
columns.description: Unique trace ID linking this record to Ops_Metrics rows for this run

setup_notes: Tab starts empty. Rows are appended by worker scripts at runtime. Do not manually edit rows — status is managed by code. Old Processing Log (from prior automation) is NOT migrated here; historical entries are preserved as-is in the legacy tab.
